overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a stormy medieval village at dusk. The character carries a torch and sword while navigating narrow alleys, market squares, and wooden buildings as rain falls.

weathered stone wall of village building with small windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval alley flanked by stone and timber buildings. He passes a villager and approaches a large stone archway that opens into the village square beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: village market square with scattered stalls

events.description: rain intensifies as wind picks up in the open square

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into an open village square, Geralt navigates around market stalls and wooden carts as rain falls. Villagers move about the square, and a shirtless man stands near barrels watching the storm.

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a covered wooden market hall, finding shelter from the rain. The interior features exposed beams, hanging lanterns, and wooden crates while villagers move about inside.

agents.ego_description: walking along village path with a dog following closely behind

segments.scene_description: Exiting the wooden building back into the rain, Geralt is joined by a dog that follows him along the village street. He passes flower beds with red blooms and wooden scaffolding as he continues through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking through market area then stopping to look around at the mountain vista

multiple market stalls with canvas canopies lining the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a bustling market area with multiple stalls before reaching an open square. He stops to survey the scene, with distant mountains visible through the stormy dusk sky as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic medieval alleyway into an open, rain-swept village square and finally into a sheltered market hall. It begins by trailing Geralt through a narrow passage flanked by stone and timber buildings, passing a villager as he approaches a large stone archway. As he emerges from the arch, the scene expands into a wide square where he navigates around market stalls and wooden carts amidst falling rain and observing villagers. The camera then follows him as he leaves the storm behind, shifting from the open air into the dim, covered interior of a wooden market hall. This final transition reveals a space of exposed beams and hanging lanterns, where the sound of rain fades into the background of a bustling indoor hub.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a wooden building out into a rain-drenched medieval village that gradually opens into a wide public square. It begins as Geralt exits the structure into the storm, accompanied by a dog that follows him past vibrant red flower beds and wooden scaffolding. As he progresses through the settlement, the narrow path expands into a bustling market area filled with various stalls. The scene then shifts toward an open square where Geralt pauses to survey the surroundings, revealing distant mountains silhouetted against a stormy dusk sky.
